channel.title: cs.AI, cs.LG updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: cs.AI, cs.LG updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Bounded-Memory Agents: A Testbed for Long-Horizon Evaluation
item.description: arXiv:2507.01001v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce a bounded-memory testbed for evaluating long-horizon agents under strict context budgets.
item.dc:creator: Ada Example, Grace Sample

item.title: Replaced Paper That Should Be Skipped
item.description: arXiv:2501.09999v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: A revision of earlier work; not news.
item.dc:creator: Old N. Ews

item.title: Cross-Listed Paper That Should Be Skipped
item.description: arXiv:2507.01002v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Primary category elsewhere; appears here as a cross listing.
item.dc:creator: C. Ross

item.title: Proxy Metrics for Agentic Capability Evaluation
item.description: arXiv:2507.01003v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose PACE, a proxy for agentic capability evaluation that correlates with end-to-end task success.
item.dc:creator: Pace Q. Metric

item.title: Third New Paper for the Cap Test
item.description: arXiv:2507.01004v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Filler paper proving that maxItems truncates in feed order.
item.dc:creator: Cap Ping
